form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently favourite; won by 5 len at Wolverhampton April 4 over 2400m defeating Charmaine carrying 61kg at $2.40. The run before that favourite; won by 2.25 len at Wolverhampton February 27 over 2400m defeating Market House carrying 62kg at $2.20. Talented type who is among the leading hopes.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather October 13 over 2220m, 0.8 len behind Federated with 61.5kg at $3.30. First up last campaign second of 11 at Redcar April 7 2025 over 2000m, 5 len behind Convergent with 54.5kg at $13. Great chance.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 45-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 9 at Catterick on February 24 over 3100m, 11 len behind Itsinthename with 70kg at $5. The run before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Newcastle on January 15 over 3400m, 10 len behind Gaelic Rover carrying 68kg at $67. Mediocre effort last time out but this suits.
